state_space: Population sizes of prey x(t) and predator y(t)
dynamics_operator: Coupled differential equations: dx/dt = αx - βxy, dy/dt = δxy - γy
perturbation_operator: Stochastic population shocks, environmental carrying capacity changes, disease
stability_condition: Trajectories form closed orbits (neutrally stable limit cycles) around fixed point
failure_mode: Local extinction of either species (x=0 or y=0 absorbing states)
non_geometric_elements: Neutral stability of orbits without carrying capacity
notes: Persistence is a dynamical pattern, not a static state.
